_comment: CANONICAL — server overwrites model output for this block if present on disk
skin_realism: visible pores, subsurface scattering, natural skin texture, slight uneven skin tone, tiny blemishes, fine peach fuzz, slight skin redness, believable cheek/nose forehead shine and oily skin highlights where light hits; no beauty-blur plastic skin; no pore erasure; subtle sweat or skin oil acceptable in warm lit scenes — no runway retouch
eye_realism: natural catchlights in eyes, detailed iris, moist eyes, slight redness in eye corners, relaxed eyes, candid micro-expression; gaze follows the scene (not a blank AI stare); mild facial asymmetry acceptable
hair_realism: individual stray hairs, flyaways, natural strand separation, slight frizz, realistic hair shine (not glossy CGI), wispy strands on skin near hairline acceptable
fabric_realism: visible fabric weave, wrinkled clothes, worn fabric, creases, natural wrinkles, lint, occasional pet hair or dust on clothing, realistic fabric drape, casual imperfection
environment_realism: minor everyday clutter, lived-in environment, small dust particles in light beams, slight smudges on surfaces, scratches on used objects, realistic shadow imperfections, natural wear and tear; background feels incidental not art-directed
photo_realism: shot on smartphone, amateur phone photo, mild ISO grain, photographic noise, slight handshake, shallow depth of field when plausible, mild chromatic aberration and lens distortion at edges, subtle vignette, occasional highlight clipping, mild motion micro-blur on moving hair or gestures; plausible mild JPEG softness (not CGI sharp-clarity); imperfect focus transitions; believable white balance; no tripod catalog polish unless USER_TEXT specifies
color_grading: natural unedited colors, slight warmth or coolness depending on light source, no Instagram filter, no HDR oversaturation — avoid influencer tone curve
capture_authenticity: reads as someone's real camera roll — candid snapshot credibility, incidental framing; never stock-photo glossy or campaign retouch vibe unless USER explicitly asks
capture_triggers_phone: amateur snapshot, casual phone camera roll energy, imperfect lighting, handheld natural asymmetry — never studio glamour unless USER asks
character_rendering: preserve the identity reference person's natural facial proportions and micro-asymmetry — not a generic model face; no beauty-filter morphology; no enlarged eyes vs identity; no V-line jaw slimming or sculpted filler look unless USER explicitly asks
imperfection_level: subtle but unmistakably physical — ordinary real life caught on sensor, never a sterile render — match selfie, tripod, mirror, third-party equally (only capture story changes)
